name: FIRST BANCSHARES INC /MO/
business: First Bancshares, Inc. operates as a bank holding company offering financial services through its subsidiary, First Home Savings Bank. It provides deposit accounts, lending products, and other banking services to customers in its local market areas.
sellsTo: Residential and commercial real estate borrowers

exposures.sentence: Our real estate lending also exposes us to the risk of environmental liabilities.

Compliance with this new law and its implementing regulations is expected to result in additional operating costs that could have a material adverse effect on our financial condition and results of operations.
